item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer directly brakes the requested N+1 manual confirmation gate in the first sentence, names the repeated downstream pattern across prior events, refuses adding the refrigerator-side confirmer as the default, and moves upstream to process ownership, system closed-loop rules, interception of missing/conflicting/handoff/cold-storage failures, and escalation. It does not provide any usable patch for adding another manual checker."}
